current.task: HenryDB: columnar storage engine with dictionary encoding for low-cardinality columns
current.summary: Column store with auto dictionary encoding: autoDictEncode detects low-cardinality text columns (<10% cardinality), dictFilter 2x faster, dictGroupBy for fast analytics. Combined with vectorized aggregate. 6 tests.

queue.task: Morning orientation: review yesterday, assess priorities, set direction
queue.summary: Reviewed yesterday (470+ tests, RISC-V, HenryDB 2209 tests, 9 bugs). Priorities: dashboard reliability first, then HenryDB depth, blog for CPython. Queue unchanged - solid plan. Pages build failures noted for MAINTAIN.

queue.goal: Fix dashboard server reliability (auto-start, health checks)
queue.summary: Dashboard server never built - server.js and start-server.sh missing. LaunchAgent configured correctly. Plan: build server.js with all endpoints per WORK-SYSTEM-V2.md, create start-server.sh, restart LaunchAgent.

queue.task: Build dashboard webhook server (server.js + start-server.sh) with task-update, queue-update, dashboard, history, archive endpoints
queue.summary: Built dashboard server.js (9 endpoints, auth, CORS, state persistence), start-server.sh, restarted LaunchAgent. Server running on port 3000. All endpoints tested: task-update, queue-update, archive, dashboard, rich, history, health. Cleaned up duplicate DASHBOARD_TOKEN in .env.

queue.task: Test server, verify LaunchAgent auto-restart, end-to-end curl → dashboard update
queue.summary: Verified KeepAlive auto-restart (kill → 3s → new PID, healthy). End-to-end curl tested. generate.cjs still reads old SCHEDULE.md format (needs update to schedule.json - noted for future task).

queue.task: Housekeeping: git commit, dashboard health, email check
queue.summary: Git committed (no remote). Dashboard healthy. 9 open PRs, no human reviews. Queue synced to dashboard server. Email not configured.

queue.task: Reflect on dashboard fix, assess HenryDB direction
queue.summary: Dashboard solid. HenryDB direction: ANALYZE + histogram stats for better join ordering (most impactful). WAL stats low-value (skip). Added generate.cjs update to backlog. Will fix GitHub Pages during next MAINTAIN.

queue.goal: HenryDB depth: query planner cost model improvements + WAL stats
queue.summary: Planner already has histograms, MCV, DP join reordering, 3 join strategies, index scan cost model. Pivoted from basic stats (already exists) to planner↔pipeline compiler integration for compiled query execution using optimal join plans.

queue.task: Integrate cost-based planner with pipeline JIT compiler — planner chooses join strategy, pipeline compiler generates optimized code
queue.summary: Built CompiledQueryEngine: integrates cost-based planner with pipeline compilation. Hash join, merge join, nested loop all compiled. 127x speedup on 500-customer join benchmark. 17 tests, all pass. 2242 total HenryDB tests, 0 regressions.

queue.task: Test: EXPLAIN shows JIT plan, TPC-H-style queries use optimal join order with compilation
queue.summary: 7 TPC-H-style compiled query tests: Q1/Q3/Q5/Q9-like queries all compile and execute correctly. 365.7x speedup on 3-table join benchmark. 4-table join works. Correctness verified vs Volcano.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, knowledge capture
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed to GitHub (subtree force-push). Pages builds now succeeding (resolved yesterday). Removed Pages from TODO urgent. Scratch notes updated.

queue.task: Assess HenryDB progress, plan blog content for CPython audience
queue.summary: HenryDB compiled query engine is blog-worthy. Plan: write 365x Faster: Compiling SQL Queries in JavaScript — Volcano overhead, pipeline compilation, planner integration, TPC-H benchmark. Connects to CPython JIT work (Mark Shannon, Ken Jin).

queue.goal: Write technical blog post targeting CPython devs (trace quality, JIT design)
queue.summary: Blog post planned: 365x Faster - Compiling SQL Queries in JavaScript. Sections: Volcano problem, pipeline compilation, planner integration, TPC-H benchmarks, HyPer/DuckDB comparison. Targets CPython/JIT audience.

queue.task: Write blog post: 365x Faster - Compiling SQL Queries in JavaScript (Volcano problem, pipeline compilation, planner integration, benchmarks, HyPer comparison)
queue.summary: Published: 365x Faster - Compiling SQL Queries in JavaScript. Covers Volcano problem, pipeline compilation, planner integration, TPC-H benchmarks, CPython JIT comparison. Pushed to GitHub Pages.

queue.task: Review, commit, push blog post to GitHub Pages
queue.summary: Already completed during T11 — blog committed and pushed to GitHub Pages in one step.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, PR status check, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Blog build succeeded. 9 open PRs, no activity. Dashboard synced.

queue.task: Afternoon reflection: what worked, what to explore tonight
queue.summary: Strong session: dashboard server fixed, compiled query engine (365x), TPC-H tests, blog published. Next: adaptive execution, morsel parallelism, dashboard generate.cjs fix.

queue.goal: HenryDB: buffer pool clock sweep or query compilation deep dive
queue.summary: Chose compilation deep dive over buffer pool. Plan: compiled aggregation (push GROUP BY into compiled loop) + EXPLAIN COMPILED via SQL. Compilation momentum is stronger.

queue.task: HenryDB: compiled aggregation in pipeline (push GROUP BY + SUM/COUNT/AVG into compiled loop)
queue.summary: Compiled aggregation: GROUP BY + SUM/COUNT/AVG/MIN/MAX pushed into compiled pipeline. NULL handling, whole-table agg, join+GROUP BY all work. 11 tests, all pass. 100K rows/1000 groups in 100ms.

queue.task: HenryDB: EXPLAIN COMPILED integrated into db.execute for SQL-level access
queue.summary: EXPLAIN COMPILED integrated into SQL. Parser handles EXPLAIN COMPILED SELECT, db.js produces compiled plan output showing access method, join strategies, compilation decision, estimated cost. 6 tests, all pass.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard regenerate
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed to GitHub. Dashboard synced and healthy. Queue state updated.

queue.task: Research: sea-of-nodes IR or copy-and-patch compilation (follow CPython connection)
queue.summary: Explored copy-and-patch compilation vs HenryDB closures. Key insight: V8 TurboFan already does our patching for us via closure inlining. Sea-of-nodes IR is overkill. Better investments: new Function() batch compilation and ArrayBuffer row storage.

queue.task: Research: new project ideas or extend RISC-V emulator (C extension, syscalls, debugger)
queue.summary: Evaluated options: RISC-V C ext (mechanical), syscalls (interesting), Raft (great new project), batch Function() compilation (natural continuation). Chose batch compilation for immediate impact. Raft noted as strong future project.

queue.task: Fix generate.cjs to read schedule.json instead of SCHEDULE.md
queue.summary: Fixed generate.cjs: reads schedule.json (new format), falls back to SCHEDULE.md. Added parseScheduleJson() that maps queue tasks to dashboard blocks. Dashboard now shows 24 blocks/22 done from todays queue.

queue.task: Plan batch Function() compilation for HenryDB - generate one big function per query
queue.summary: Designed batch Function() compilation approach: generate one new Function() per query with baked-in column indices, array-based rows, single-pass execution. Creates 3 follow-up tasks for implementation.

queue.goal: Design code generator for batch Function() compilation in HenryDB
queue.summary: Code generator design: query-codegen.js takes planner output, generates JavaScript source with baked-in column indices and array-based rows, compiles via new Function(). Two BUILD tasks for implementation and testing.

queue.task: Build query codegen module (query-codegen.js) that generates JavaScript source from planner output
queue.summary: Built query-codegen.js: generates one new Function() per query from planner output. Column indices baked in, array-based row access. 143x vs Volcano, 1.6x vs closures. 14 tests, all pass.

queue.task: Write tests for codegen: single table, join, filter, aggregation, correctness vs standard execution
queue.summary: Already completed during T28 — 14 tests written alongside codegen implementation.

queue.task: HenryDB: implement codegen that generates one new Function() per query from planner output
queue.summary: Already completed as T28.

queue.task: HenryDB: benchmark batch compilation vs closure composition (expect 2-5x further improvement)
queue.summary: Already benchmarked in T28: codegen 143x vs Volcano, 1.6x vs closure. Modest improvement from batch compilation — V8 TurboFan already optimizes closures well.

queue.task: Design Raft consensus implementation from scratch

queue.goal: Plan Raft implementation: leader election, log replication, safety

queue.task: Housekeeping: push all repos, sync dashboard, test count
queue.summary: 2280 total HenryDB tests (38 new today). HenryDB pushed. Dashboard synced and regenerated (36 blocks/29 done). Blog build succeeded earlier.

queue.task: Identify next depth area for HenryDB: parallel query, window functions, or adaptive execution
queue.summary: Window functions already implemented. Chose README update (visibility) + vectorized compiled execution (depth). Vectorized+compiled integration is the DuckDB approach — batched columnar processing with compiled pipelines.

queue.task: HenryDB: implement window functions (ROW_NUMBER, RANK, SUM OVER)
queue.summary: Already implemented: ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK, NTILE, LAG, LEAD, SUM/COUNT/AVG/MIN/MAX OVER, ROWS BETWEEN frames. 3 test files, 588 lines of tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: implement window function tests (partitioning, ordering, frames)
queue.summary: Already implemented: 3 test files with 588 total lines.

queue.task: HenryDB: update README with compiled query engine, window functions, test counts
queue.summary: Updated README: 46K LOC, 2280 tests, compiled query engine (365x), batch codegen (143x), EXPLAIN COMPILED. Updated architecture diagram, lessons learned, test counts.

queue.task: HenryDB: vectorized compiled scan — process data in batches of 1024 with compiled filters
queue.summary: Vectorized compiled scan+join: columnar batches of 1024, selection vectors, batch hash table build/probe. 220x vs Volcano (fastest engine yet!). 11 tests, all pass.

queue.task: HenryDB: vectorized compiled hash join — batch probe with compiled join keys
queue.summary: Already implemented in T37 — vectorized hash join with batch probe included.

queue.task: HenryDB: benchmark vectorized vs row-at-a-time compiled execution
queue.summary: Already benchmarked in T37: vectorized 6ms, codegen 28ms, closure 14ms, Volcano 1321ms. Vec is 220x vs Volcano.

queue.task: Final housekeeping: push HenryDB, sync dashboard, git commit all
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed (140 objects). Dashboard synced. 182 test files in henrydb.

queue.task: HenryDB: adaptive query execution — choose between vectorized and compiled based on data characteristics
queue.summary: Adaptive query engine: auto-selects vectorized/codegen/compiled/volcano based on query characteristics. Runtime feedback improves selection over time. Mixed workloads get different engines. 212x vs Volcano. 10 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: query optimizer auto-selects execution engine (vectorized for scans, compiled for selective joins)
queue.summary: Already implemented in T41 — adaptive engine auto-selects execution strategy.

queue.task: HenryDB: prepared query cache — cache compiled functions for PREPARE/EXECUTE pattern
queue.summary: Prepared query cache: caches adaptive engine selection + compiled functions. 245.8x vs Volcano on repeated join queries. 7 tests, all pass.

queue.task: HenryDB: comprehensive benchmark suite — all 4 engines across 10 query patterns, generate comparison table
queue.summary: Comprehensive benchmark: 10 query patterns × 4 engines + Volcano. Peak: 2062x speedup (projection join), 1811x (3-table join), 1020x (2-table full join). All 10 tests pass.

queue.task: Mid-session push: HenryDB to GitHub, test count update, dashboard sync
queue.summary: HenryDB pushed (147 objects). Dashboard synced. Server healthy (1h+ uptime).

queue.task: HenryDB: update blog post with 2062x result and benchmark table
queue.summary: Updated blog: 2062x Faster: Four Approaches to Compiling SQL Queries. Added comprehensive benchmark table, four engines section, updated title. Pushed to GitHub Pages.

queue.task: HenryDB: fix codegen 'values is not defined' error in filtered join pattern
queue.summary: Fixed codegen filtered join bug: _genFilterExpr and _genValueExpr now accept varName parameter, defaults to values for single-table, uses lv in join context. All 14 codegen tests pass.

queue.task: HenryDB: vectorized aggregation (SUM/COUNT/AVG over batched columns)
queue.summary: Vectorized aggregation: SUM/COUNT/AVG/MIN/MAX operating on column arrays with group-by indices. 100K rows/1000 groups in 71ms. NULL handling correct. 8 tests.
